overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city center. The player walks along multi-lane streets and sidewalks, passing towering glass skyscrapers with cyan and magenta neon lighting, digital billboards, and palm trees while light traffic moves through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street approaching elevated highway

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal towering neon-lit skyscrapers against the night sky

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the multi-lane street toward the elevated highway overpass

entered.detail: curved multi-level highway overpass with illuminated supports and cyan neon lighting
tall glass tower with cyan neon edge lighting and vertical digital advertisements
large screen displaying colorful abstract graphics with pink and blue hues
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide futuristic city street at night, walking toward a massive elevated highway overpass. The camera tilts upward to reveal towering glass skyscrapers illuminated with cyan neon lights against the dark sky, while large digital billboards glow on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with yellow pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: camera tilts down from skyscrapers back to street level
player character steps onto the yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection via the marked pedestrian crosswalk, moving from one side to the other

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: broad yellow-striped pedestrian crossing spanning the multi-lane road
modern building facades with illuminated entrances and glass windows

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts down from the skyscrapers to street level, approaching a yellow-striped crosswalk. The player crosses the intersection as a futuristic car passes by, with modern shopfronts visible on the right and the neon skyscraper still towering on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: under elevated highway with steep ramp

events.description: camera turns right to look up the steep ramp leading to the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: reaching the far side of the intersection and turning to survey the highway ramp and surrounding area

entered.detail: steep inclined road leading up to the elevated highway with yellow accent lighting
distant mountain silhouette visible through the overpass structure against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Now under the elevated highway structure, the camera turns to reveal a steep ramp leading upward. The space is partially sheltered by the overpass above, with distant mountains visible through the concrete supports. The player surveys the area before proceeding.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with palm trees and digital signage

events.description: begins walking forward along the sidewalk parallel to the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the illuminated sidewalk passing palm trees and digital billboards, following the street

notable_agents.action: person with red hair walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: wide concrete pedestrian walkway with embedded ground lighting
series of large illuminated advertisement screens on building walls displaying various graphics

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a wide sidewalk lined with palm trees and glowing digital billboards. The elevated highway is now visible in the distance to the right, while futuristic cars pass by on the street. Other pedestrians walk ahead on the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic city center, moving from the open scale of towering skyscrapers toward the sheltered underbelly of an elevated highway and back into a palm-lined promenade. It begins on a wide street, tilting upward to take in massive glass skyscrapers glowing with cyan neon and vibrant digital billboards against the dark night sky. As the camera tilts back down to street level, it crosses a yellow-striped intersection past modern shopfronts while a futuristic car glides by. The scene then shifts beneath the heavy concrete supports of an elevated highway, where the camera turns to reveal a steep upward ramp and a glimpse of distant mountains through the structure. Finally, the path opens up onto a wide sidewalk lined with palm trees and glowing advertisements, following other pedestrians as the highway recedes into the distance.
